name: Movements
description:
'''Movements''' are a [[post-hardcore]] band from [[Rancho Santa Margarita, California]], formed in 2015.

The band was signed to a record contract with [[Fearless Records]] after playing just one show in 2015. They have released an EP, ''[[Outgrown Things]]'' (2016), and three albums, ''[[Feel Something (Movements album)|Feel Something]]'' (2017), ''[[No Good Left to Give]]'' (2020), and ''RUCKUS!'' (2023). ''Feel Something'' peaked at 190 on the [[Billboard 200|''Billboard'' 200]] chart.
